checks.description: Rancher must use TLS for ingress connections

check.command: kubectl get secret tls-rancher-ingress -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.data.tls\.crt}' 2>&1

checks.description: Rancher must use a trusted TLS certificate
RBAC must be configured with cluster-admin limited to authorized accounts

check.command: kubectl get settings audit-level -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'not_set'

checks.description: Rancher audit logging must be enabled at level 1 or higher
Rancher must be configured with an external authentication provider

check.command: kubectl get settings auth-user-session-ttl-minutes -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}'

checks.description: Rancher user session timeout must be set to 60 minutes or less
Network policies must be defined for the Rancher namespace

check.command: kubectl get deployment rancher -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'

checks.description: Rancher must be deployed with at least 2 replicas for availability

check.command: kubectl get settings server-url -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}'

checks.description: Rancher server URL must use HTTPS
Pod security policies or standards must be configured
TLS secrets must be present in the cattle-system namespace

check.command: kubectl get settings ui-banners -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}'

checks.description: Rancher must display a login banner

check.command: kubectl get settings cacerts -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}'

checks.description: Rancher must be configured with a custom CA certificate
Rancher must use a supported and current version

check.command: kubectl get settings agent-tls-mode -n cattle-system -o jsonpath='{.value}'

checks.description: Rancher agent TLS mode must be set to strict
